mapper.select: SELECT sum(unit_price * qty) FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT name FROM tb_status WHERE id = #{statusId}

SELECT tspd.id AS productId, (SELECT name FROM tb_product WHERE id = tspd.product_id) AS productName, image, tspd.qty AS inStock, a.qty AS qty, a.unit_price AS unitPrice, (a.qty * a.unit_price) AS subTotal FROM tb_order_detail AS a JOIN tb_store_product_detail tspd ON a.store_product_id = tspd.id WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT tspd.id AS productId, (SELECT name FROM tb_product WHERE id = tspd.product_id) AS productName, image, tspd.qty AS inStock, a.qty AS qty, a.unit_price AS unitPrice, (a.qty * a.unit_price) AS subTotal FROM tb_order_detail AS a JOIN tb_store_product_detail tspd ON a.store_product_id = tspd.id WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 1 ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 1 ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 2 ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 2 ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 3 ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 3 ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 4 ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 4 ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 5 ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 5 ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 2
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 1
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 3
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 4
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 5
SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT tspd.id AS productId, (SELECT name FROM tb_product WHERE id = tspd.product_id) AS productName, tspd.image, tspd.qty AS inStock, od.qty, od.unit_price AS unitPrice, (od.qty * od.unit_price) AS subTotal FROM tb_order_detail od JOIN tb_store_product_detail tspd ON od.store_product_id = tspd.id WHERE od.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND store_id = #{storeId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status_id = 1)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status_id = 2)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status_id = 3)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status_id = 5)
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 2 WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 6 WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 3 WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 4 WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_store_product_detail AS S JOIN tb_order_detail O ON S.id = O.store_product_id WHERE O.id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}) AND s.qty >= O.qty
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT store_product_id FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT distributor_account_id FROM tb_store WHERE id = (SELECT store_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{cartId})
